titleStmt.title: SII 20.111: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 111. (B.K. No. 21 of 1936-37.) DEVARNĀVADGI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated the 2nd regnal year, Siddhārthi, Pushya, Paurṇamāsyā, Sunday, Lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1140, January 6, Saturday, and the saṁkrānti occurred on December 25 of the previous year, the weekday being Monday. The said eclipse did not occur on either of the days.

The inscription, which is badly effaced, because of a thick coat of oil, records a gift of land, etc., made by Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Sōvidēvarasa of the Seḷara family who was the manneya of Eḷamēla-nāḍu, at the instance of Perggaḍe D�varāja to the temple of Mūlasthāna Mallikārjunadēva built by the latter at Nāvidige in Eḷamēla-ṇāḍu-30. It gives a genealogical account of both these persons.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . sarasīruhōdarōdarasarōjasamanvitarā
gi bhūbhujarddharegadhinātharāgire caḷukyakuḷōdbhava tailapaṁ taguḷvariyarenippa raṭṭakula maṁ geludintu samastadhātṛgīśvaranenisi
ṛdanā kramadoḷāḻdavanīśvararattalārenal . kramadiṁ satyāśraya vikramanṛpa jaya siṁhadēvanāhavamallaṁ vimaḷaya
śaṁ bhuvanaikaṁ samarōcchṛtavikramāṁka bhūlōkanripa . Avariṁ baḷiya . navakhaṁḍa pṛthviyanāḷvavanīśarggadhikanenisi permmāḍinripaṁ navarūpa
navayavvana navasiṁhāsanamenalu caḷukyānvayadoḷu . magadhananetti māḻavananotti kaḷiṁgana tūḻdu cōḷanaṁ taguḻdeṟeyaṭṭi gūrjjarana
naṭṭi sakaḷāvaniyaṁ nimirccalārige migilādanīta nijavikramadiṁ nijabāhuvīryya diṁdagaṇitakīrttivettanenisalu negaḷdaṁ jagadēkama
llama . Ādaṟiṁ samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta rōttarābhivṟiddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttamire rājadhāni kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinōda diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajī
vi hannoṁduvare lakke manneyara gaṁṇḍaneḷemēlunāḍa manneya śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷē svaraṁ sōvidēvarasaranvayāvatāraveṁtene . ka . khēcararā
jādhipanavanīcariyoḍagūḍalogeda seḷaṟānvayadoḷu khēcarana dānaguṇadiṁ bāca legaṁ siṁhanṟipatigaṁ sōmanripa . Udayagirīṁdradiṁ di
napanaṁbudhiyiṁdamritāṁsu rāgadiṁdudayisuvaṁdadiṁ negaḷda bācaladēviga siṁhabhū bhujaṁgodave manōrathaṁ ripunripargge kutū
haḷa puṭṭe puṭṭidaṁ sadamaḷakīrttiyaṁ taḷediḷēsvara sōmayamaṁḍaḷēsvara . modalu vicārisalu khēcararanvayavaṁtavariṁde baṁda vaṁsa
doḷadaṭaṁ stiraṁ kula samastaguṇāsreya siṁhabhūpa siṁhada maṟi siṁhamaṁ neṟeye pōluvudu cōdyame sōmabhūpanā viditavisu
ddhakīrtti kuladharmamanārjjise cōdyamallavē . kritayugadādirājara caritra caritra virōdhi rājasaṁtativesarilladaṁtaṟisi koṁdana vikrama vi
kramaṁ mahōnnatiyyavudāryya khēcara dadhīci sibi bali bhānunaṁdanapratiyeni pārppadārppanidiḷēsvara sōmayamaṇḍaḷēsvara . dorevettaudāryyacintā
maṇiya kaṇiyenippantagāṁbhīryyadiṁ sāgaravēḷuṁ sālaveṁbantiḷevaṟiyada permme dharācakravādaṁba racakrakkattamattaṁ miḷiṟubaḷasi nirṛdante vikhyātakīrttī
svararā sōvidēvakṣitipatiyavol dhātriyoḷ rājaputrar . Antenisida negartteyiṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara tagaranagarādhīsvara ḍaṁgā
rabhērīnirghōsaṇa samaravibhīsaṇa suvarṇnagaruḍadhvaja vimaḷakīrttidhvaja siḷāṟavaṁsa prasūta jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūta ripumaṇḍaḷikaśiragirivajradaṇḍa
kāminīkridayakusmakōdaṇḍa raṇaraṁga nīṟa siṁganaṁkakāṟa visamahayārūḍha prauḍharēvanta vijayalakṣmīkāntanarasaṁkasūnagāṟa paracakrasūṟekāṟa
lōkajagadaḷa vairikāḷānaḷa ś®matu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēva pādārādhaka parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ ś®manu
mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ sōvidēvarasareḷemēlunāḍa mūvattaṟa baḷiya nābidigeya prabhugaḷa mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . ka . cōḷana kayyānisi nirmmūḷisi vanani
daribhūpāḷaraneḷavarisidarā ḍarāja mārtāṁ ḍana vōl . vri . dradalu sēvisuva bhīkara vārddhiyoḷu puruḍirppaṁ
ke carisuvaṁ sīḻdikkuvaṁ dāniyō sura kāmadhēnu vinōdaṁ kōḍikkuvaṁ tānenalu doreyārpāsaṭiyārdharā niḷayadoḷ śrīguṇḍadaṁṇḍē
ta daṇḍādhipanakhiḷamahīkāntanā vikramāṁkaṁganitu kārjjuna nārādhipaṁ viśvanāthaykanenippaṁ bhuktimuktipradamaṁ
danyanō daṁḍādhipacūḍāmaṇi sakaḷaguṇāḷaṁkritaṁ sōvidēva . Ā mahānubhāvana māvaṁ perggaḍe dāvarājana negartteyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . śrī .
svasti samastabhūjananaguṇasurarājyabharakṣamānvitaṁ mātyapadavīvi stuguṇatrayakkeseva maṁtradinutsavadiṁ prabhutvadindaṁ stu
tivettananvayavadeṁtene perggaḍe dāvarājana . ka . dāmōdara brahmaṁ sāmātharvvaṇarigyaju tāmama nālkāgalāgada nālku
mukhadoḷ . Ā nālkuvēdabhēdaṁ nānāvidhadiṁdanēka śāstrārthagaḷiṁ nānākrama vānvayarddharegāḷdidar . Antogedarī jagadoḷage mahantaṁ
kaunḍilyanā mahātmana kuladoḷkantunibharsarvvadēvara nā mahāprabhu . v® . prabhu maṁtrōtsāha śaktitrayaguṇaniḷayarvviśvalakṣmīnivāsa
rvvibhavaprakhyātabhūtnarssakaḷaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritarssarvva ś® sōyiyakkaṁ gādavara sutaṁ mūrttigoṁḍante putra bhāsitānvayabhūbhuvana jananu
taprabhāvaru . ka . hariharahiraṇyana garbhbha yanalke yāditya nākarasa puruṣōttama dāvarājanene pesarvvaḍedar .
Avaroḷage maṁtriratnaṁ bhuvanaprakhyātakīrtti viśru raṁ bhūbhuvanastutanenisi dāvarājaṁ negaḷda . trijagamanaṁgajaṁ paḍedu vastugaḷaṁ ku
gāvudeṁdarigittu kalpakujami jayaṁ sujanana dāvarāja vesara
ḷalkesedaṁ dharitriyoḷ . Antu negarttevetta . vri . dirppavanoḷpina kīrttivikhyātigaḷoppe tamma riṁdeseyuttire . veṁbudaṁ ni
samastaśāstra daṁtiḷidaṁteḷamēlanāḍinoḷu khyāti geyoḷu dharmavanārjji . ka . ś®mannāvidigeyo malegaḷoḷese
va mallikārjunadēva bhaktanenalintī mūlasthānadalli nelasire ma dāvarājaṁpa bhaktipūrvvakaṁ tanage damideṁdu roḷodavida
dhiṣṭhāna mappa trikūṭācaḷamaṁ nilisidante māḍisida mūlastāna [ś®]mallikārjjunadēvarggaṁ tamma sariṁtuma pratiṣṭhe
karēśvaradēvarggaṁ lōkaikane nārādhyanenisidādityadēvargga diṁti kū ṭa roppaṁbaḍeye māḍi pa
dapiṁdirppaṁdu kaiḷāsa damarādriyantadaṁ tō vattamā dēvaruṁ mudadiṁdirppina dāvarājavibhuvatyutsāhadiṁ māḍisalkadu
tādrigaḷ . nelasida ni mattamalli baṁdosedu caṁdragiriyiṁ niṁdamadu kṣētradoḷu kuladeyvamenalā di brahmaṁge
ye māḍisi griha diṁ baḷasida parisūtranrityamaṁṭapadiṁdaṁ jaḷaruhanābhana bhavanada miḷirvva ḷoḷeseguvatiśayadinda . Ā
puradoḷage celviṁ madanana seva citragrihaṁgaḷu ti ḷisuva sudatiyatige dēvalōkavirppaṁtirkku . gadya . Aṁtu sakaḷalōkada celvella
vanoṁdeḍege teraḷci viśvakarmmana māge nirmmisi svarggasthānava yadiralidake pratisthānamāgiralu svarggaṁgāṇade narargge svarggavī mārggaveṁdu tōṟuvuda danā
dharāvibhāgadoḷu taṁdu nili vicitramāge māḍisidanā bhavanaṁ ś® mallikārjjunadēvarggavā stānada dēvargga nitakkavaṁgabhōgaraṁga bhōga trikālā
rccanāḷaṁkārakke saṁpūrṇnavritti lpisuva bageyiṁdeḷamēlanāḍa manneyaṁ tyāgacintāmaṇiyenisida ś®manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tammāḷdaṁ sōvidēva rasaraṁ barisi
tōṟalā dharmmada mahimeyaṁ nōḍi mecci saṁtōśaṁbaḍalī dharmamaṁ nimma pratihastanāgi māḍisida rājarakṣitaṁ dharmmameṁbudaṁ divya tadoḷavadhārisi nimma hermmeyuvida
mumācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi salvantire praciṁteyaṁ māḍi parirakṣisalu vērkkumeṁdu herggaḍe dāvarājaṁ binnapaṁgeyyalāyayyana sadbhaktigaṁ sadvinayakkaṁ me
cci yā dharmavaṁ nūrmmaḍi māḷvartthiyiṁ bhaktipūrvakaṁ ś®matpratāpacāḷukya cakravartti jagadēkamalladēvavarṣaderaḍaneya sidārtthisaṁvatsarada puśyada paurṇna
māsye yādityavāra sōmagrahaṇa vyatīpātaduttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti yintinutuṁ puṇyatithigaḷu kūḍalēnaṁ māḍidaḍavakṣayaphalaveṁbudaṁ dharmmaśāstradiṁ ti
ḷidu kṣatriyarge bhūmidānamuṁ bhūmipālaneyaṁ miguva dharmmavilleṁbudaṟiṁ nāvidigeya tamma koḍagaṁbolada māṇikēsparada kōla nūṟayvatu mattarkke yyamaṁ
Ā kōlaloṁdu mattarttōṁṭavoṁdu mattarggadde yā baḷiya dēvara purōvasatha mane baṇaṁbeverasu śulka karabādhāparihāra nidhinidhānanikṣēpasahitanaṁ
gulīprēkṣaṇīya sarvvanamaśyaṁ māḍi ś® mallikārjjunadēvara divya śrīpādapadmaṁgaḷalli naiṣṭhikasthānavāgi śiḷāśāsanasahita dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyya staḷa ni
rddēśaveṁtene mūḍaṇa sīmeyalli . ka . kummasige kakkaneḷamēlugaṁ māḍida baṭṭe paḍuvalu paḷḷaṁ kummasiya sīme baḍagalu nammiṁ sirisigeya baṭṭe teṁkaṇa deseyoḷu .
gadya . Aṁtu jaḷapāśāṇasahita caturāghāṭasuddha sukṣētravāgaḷ vrittige viniyōgaveṁteṁdaḍe sugaṁdhaparimaḷānēkapuṟṭamālyāṁbarābharaṇōpakaraṇa
dhūpārutiyakhaṇḍadīpamāḷāvaḷīkaṁdamūḷaphaḷapatraśākhānēkapakvānna śaḍurasāyanā dyōgaranaivēdya tāṁbūḷa kuṁkuma caṁdanānulēpanakka vanaduyyala parvvakkaṁ mattaṁ caitra
pavitrārōhaṇakkamācāryyargaśanāchādanakya khaṇḍasghuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkavanā gata bādhāpratiśēdhavāgi �vakaṭṭi koṭṭa mattar nālvattu nitya naimittika gītavādya vividhavādya
kka nrityavidyādhariviḷāsiniyariṁdeseva raṁgaśōbheyasamudāya rddhanege mattar yerppattu nityamāṁgalya sōbheya paṁcamahāśabdakke mattareṁṭu dhavaḷaśaṁkha gītanādakke ma
ttar nālku brahmapuriyeraḍakke nivēśana sahitaṁ mattareṁṭu pūjāri brāhmaṇaṁge mattar hattu A Āstānada keṟeyuṁ sā vaṁtāgi biṭṭa mattar hattu Antu gadde tōṁ
ṭa sahitaṁ mattar 150 dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇaveraḍu Iṁtinitu samakaṭṭu manapōhavāgalīyade naḍasuvantāgi . ka . yamaniyamāgamaśāstrakramadiṁ japa
hōmadiṁdanuṣṭhānadoḷaṁ vimaḷamatiyamaraśaktige sumanassiṁ maṇḍaḷēśa sōmamahīśa . Ācāryatvamanosedittācaṁdrastāyiyāge śāsanakritiyaṁ rēcaṇabhaṭṭa
viracise bhūcakradoḷeseye barasidaṁ śāsanama . gōcarmmamātraṁ bhūmiya bhūcakra doḷittavargge svargaphaḷaṁ tānā carmmarōmada mādinā carmmāntarada sasiya bērggaḷa pavaṇi .
Āda rakṣipaṁge sāśvatapadavidirggoḷgadaṟoḷaṁnamaṁ māḍuvavaṁgodavida rauravanaraka dalu ḷoḷarṛdikku kalpakōṭisahasradiṁdāvanoṁdu ratnamanoṁdaṁgula bhūmi
yanidanapaharisidavaṁgeṁdu varavajāṁḍakṣayaveṁdu rauravaghōranarakadoḷaguḷidikku . nīrira daḍaviyoḷu kriṣṇōraganāgikku śuṣkakōṭaradoḷagiṁtōrante sāgu huṭṭugu dhāri
ṇiyuḷḷinega vipradēyāpahāra . vri . karaviḍiyallidalikaramaṁ śri tananantakōṭi viprarumananantagōvividhakōṭisahaśrama vāraṇāsiyoḷu tarataradiṁ svahasta vadhe geyda
vanuḷḷuda biṭṭavaṁgiḷāmararigantā gōvividha kōṭisahasramanitta tatphala . ka . barevaṁ brahmaṁ kaḍitaṁ dhare baḷapaṁ himagirīṁdranāradavantuṁ paramana muṁdomme savistaramārppiṁ
bhōgaphalama lekkisalaḷave . vri . dhareyuṁ saptakuḷādriyuṁ jaḷadhiyuṁ caṁdrārkkaruṁ digvadhūvararuṁ pannega bhavanamuṁ brahmāṇḍamuṁ viśvamuṁ surarippa nnega sō
mabhūpa mudadiṁdaṁ māḍidī dharmma vistara lōkōttaramāge bhōgisalgaṁ bhadraṁ subhaṁ maṁgaḷa . © śrī mūlasthāna mallikārjjunadēvargge Alliya staḷada samasta praje
taḷada baṇaṁjigaruṁ nāḍa seṭṭiguttaruṁ vaṇaruṁ biṭṭāya bhattavaṁ māṟida hoṁge koṭṭalli māna 1 koṇḍalli māna 1 hēṟiṁgele nūṟu hēṟiṁge 50 Aḍake māṟida hoṁge hattu yiṁ
tī dharmmavaṁ tribhōgadarasugaḷu nāḍugaḷuṁ samasta prajegaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . ś® mālastāna mallikārjjuna dēvara pūrvada pūjāri malikajīyargge pūrvvavritti nivēsana sahitaṁ
māṇikēsvarada kōla mattar 12 Ā dēgulavaṁ nirmmāṇa māḍida biṁnnāṇi tippōjaṁge jīrṇnōddhārakke biṭṭa keyyoḷagā kōla mattaru 2 maneyondu pratipāḷisi naḍasuvaru
damaged
Digital edition of SII 20.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
